TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Eddie Biedenbach nalecuhan i Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Eddie Biedenbach i 1968 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 4 ku uwac atu silsil 45, namapili' tu nu Los Angeles Lakers putiput. tatama, nalecuhan i 8 a bulad 12 a demiad, 1945 a mihcan, Eddie Biedenbach, miunduay.
S.PHON: …ôddi…ô bi…ôd…ônba ¶ƒß nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan i pittsburgƒß, p…ônnsjr~…æ*ania, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~…æi miunduaj nu amir~…æika nba nisakaput, paƒßanƒßanan tu kawaw ajza. …ôddi…ô bi…ôd…ônba ¶ƒß i **** a miƒß ¶an nba sapapir~…æi î~ ° mimar~…æiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…æsir~…æ **, namapir~…æi î~ ° tu nu r~…æos a≈ã…ôr~…æ…ôs r~…æak…ôrs putiput. tatama, nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan i * a bur~…æad ** a d…ômiad, **** a miƒß ¶an, …ôddi…ô bi…ôd…ônba ¶ƒß, miunduaj.
S.FORM: Eddie Biedenbach nalecuhan i Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Eddie Biedenbach i 1968 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 4 ku uwac atu silsil 45, namapili' tu nu Los Angeles Lakers putiput. tatama, nalecuhan i 8 a bulad 12 a demiad, 1945 a mihcan, Eddie Biedenbach, miunduay.
